headline: Helen of Troy (HELE) Surges 6.0%: Is This an Indication of Further Gains?
summary: Helen of Troy (HELE) saw its shares surge in the last session with trading volume being higher than average. The latest trend in earnings estimate revisions may not translate into further price increase in the near term.
